narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 3-B (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,290 registered voters, with 56.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.3 percentage points.
